doctor.Why Is My Phone: Why is my phone number not showing up to patients?
doctor.The Number Is Only: The number is only shown to patients whose reservation is confirmed to ensure they are serious.
doctor.You Can Contact Us: You can contact us directly via email:

doctor.Write Your Problem Here: Write your problem here in detail...
doctor.We Collect The Following: We collect the following data to ensure quality of service:
doctor.University Data: University data and academic level (if any).
doctor.How Your Data Appears: How your data appears to patients?
doctor.How Data Appears Desc: Your name and specialty (and ratings) are shown to patients to help them choose the right student. Your phone number is only shown after the booking is confirmed (depending on application settings).
doctor.Account Security Desc: We apply high security standards to protect your data and ensure that no unauthorized party has access to it.
doctor.Str 297: We take strict security measures to protect your data from unauthorized access, alteration, or disclosure.
doctor.Str 300: As a user of the application as a dental student, you acknowledge and agree to adhere to the professional and ethical rules in force in your college and under the supervision of faculty members.
doctor.n: • The student is solely responsible for the medical procedures he performs.   The application does not provide legal or insurance cover for the student.  The patient must be clearly informed that you are a "student" and that the treatment takes place in an educational framework.
doctor.Commitment To Attending Scheduled: Commitment to attending scheduled appointments with patients.   In the event of cancellation, the patient must be notified well in advance of the appointment.   Repeated unexcused absences may lead to the closure of your account.
doctor.N 1: • Maintaining the confidentiality and privacy of patient data.   Dealing respectfully and professionally with all users of the application.   It is prohibited to use patient data for any purpose outside the framework of educational treatment.
doctor.The Thoutha Application Is: The Thoutha application is a technical means of connection only and does not interfere in the therapeutic process or academic evaluation.

Help And Support.Technical Support Is Limited: Technical support is limited only to technical problems related to the use of the application.
Help And Support.You Can Contact Us: You can contact us via email:
Help And Support.The Support Team Does: The support team does not intervene in any disputes or agreements between students and patients.
Help And Support.The Applications Role Is: The application's role is limited to connecting only the two parties.
Help And Support.If You Encounter Any: If you encounter any technical problem while using the Thoutha application, or you have a question regarding registration or account, the technical support team is ready to help you.

onboarding.We Get Into The: We get into the topic at length
onboarding.Careful Monitoring Of Your: Careful monitoring of your dental health
onboarding.At Thoutha We Have: At Thoutha, we have gathered the best students and dentists to provide you with real care at student prices. Your smile is in safe hands, with an elite group of the most skilled young doctors.
onboarding.Choose The Time That: Choose the time that suits you and book with your favorite doctor in seconds. Our appointment booking service is easy, fast and secure.
onboarding.Get A Complete History: Get a complete history of your treatments and upcoming appointments. We care about your smile from the first visit.

Privacy Policy.The Application May Collect: The application may collect the following data:
Privacy Policy.The Application Does Not: 🔒 The application does not collect or store any sensitive medical records.
Privacy Policy.Completing The Reservation Process: Completing the reservation process between the patient and the dental student
Privacy Policy.The Data Is Only: The data is only used for:
Privacy Policy.Sending Notifications To The: Sending notifications to the doctor of a new reservation
Privacy Policy.Helping The User Through: Helping the user through a chatbot
Privacy Policy.Improve The User Experience: Improve the user experience within the application
Privacy Policy.User Data Is Not: 🚫 User data is not sold or shared with any third party.
Privacy Policy.Contact Us If You: Contact us if you have any privacy-related inquiries
Privacy Policy.We Are Committed To: We are committed to taking appropriate technical measures to protect user data from unauthorized access or illegal use.
Privacy Policy.The User Has The: The user has the right to:
Privacy Policy.By Using The Thoutha: By using the Thoutha application, you agree to this privacy policy.
Privacy Policy.The Thoutha Application Is: The Thoutha application is keen to protect the privacy of its users, both patients and dental students. This policy explains how data is collected, used and protected within the app.
Privacy Policy.By Using The Thoutha 1: By using the Thoutha application, you automatically agree to this privacy policy.

requests.When You Delete An: When you delete a request, new patients will not be able to see it, but previous bookings associated with it will remain in your records.

Terms And Conditions.Second The Role Of: Second: The role of applying Thoutha
Terms And Conditions.The Application Is Only: The application is only a means of connection between the student and the patient.
Terms And Conditions.Any Agreement Concluded Is: Any agreement concluded is a direct agreement between the two parties.
Terms And Conditions.We Do Not Control: We do not control the quality of treatment or its results.
Terms And Conditions.We Do Not Guarantee: We do not guarantee that any party will attend the appointment.
Terms And Conditions.The Application Does Not: The application does not guarantee the student’s commitment to attendance.
Terms And Conditions.The Thoutha Application Is: The Thoutha application is a free electronic application whose goal is to connect students of dental colleges with patients who wish to receive educational therapeutic services.The application does not provide medical services, does not supervise treatment, and does not bear any medical or legal responsibility resulting from the interaction between the student and the patient.
Terms And Conditions.The Patient Is Responsible: The patient is responsible for ensuring that he is dealing with a student and not a licensed doctor.
Terms And Conditions.The Application Is Not: The application is not responsible for any medical or material damages.
Terms And Conditions.Failure To Attend Or: Failure to attend or cancel the appointment. The application does not bear any responsibility.
Terms And Conditions.Adherence To Appointments And: Adherence to appointments and clear communication with patients.
Terms And Conditions.The Student Bears Full: The student bears full responsibility for any medical procedure.
Terms And Conditions.The Application Has The: The application has the right to delete the account in case of misuse.
Terms And Conditions.The Student Acknowledges That: The student acknowledges that he is a dental student and not a doctor.
Terms And Conditions.Thoutha Application Is Not: Thoutha application is not responsible for any medical diagnosis, treatment results, or disputes that occur between the student and the patient.
Terms And Conditions.Your Use Of The: Your use of the application means your full agreement to these terms.
